default_protocol_input_amplitudes.notes: Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_elevator(percent) segmented plateau medians; recommended +0.77 normalized pitch.
Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_aileron(percent) clean plateaus; recommended +1.00 normalized roll.
No clean Mar-30th-2026 lateral_left segment in Airdata; mirrored from lateral_right magnitude to preserve protocol symmetry (-1.00 roll).
Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_throttle(percent) climb segments; plateau median supports +1.00 normalized throttle.
Calibrated from Mar-30th-2026 Airdata rc_throttle(percent) descent segments; plateau median supports -1.00 normalized throttle.
